name: OnXcpError
title: OnXcpError
syntax: void OnXcpError (char ecuQualifier[], byte xcpCmd, byte xcpErrorCode);
description: Whenever the XCP slaves answers with a negative response (i.e. not 0xFF) the OnXCPError callback function is called.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device, configured within the CANoe XCP/CCP Window.
